notification_filters.description: The types of notifications that will result in a url notification for this user.

category.description: The category of the failed notification.

event_type.description: The event type of the failed notification.

object_id.description: The object id used to generate the body of the notification.

exception_message.description: The exception bunq encountered when processing the callback.

response_code.description: The response code (or null) received from the endpoint.
